parameters.content:
## Sogni LLM Describe Uploaded Image

Drag an image into the form, submit it, and Sogni LLM will describe what it sees.

### Setup
1. Install `n8n-nodes-sogni`
2. Add Sogni credentials
3. Open the form URL from `Upload Image`
4. Drag an image into the upload field and submit

### Notes
- This uses a Form Trigger file upload field
- The workflow converts the uploaded image into a data URL for Sogni vision chat
- The result is shown on the browser completion page

parameters.formDescription: Upload an image and Sogni LLM will describe it for you.

nodes.name: Upload Image
nodes.notes: Submit an uploaded image to trigger the vision example

nodes.name: Build Vision Request
nodes.notes: Converts the uploaded file into a data URL and builds a multimodal chat request

parameters.llmPrompt: Describe the uploaded image in 120 words or less.

nodes.name: Describe Image
nodes.notes: Runs a vision-style Sogni LLM description request

nodes.name: Format Description Page
nodes.notes: Builds the browser response page for the image description

nodes.name: Show Description Page
nodes.notes: Shows the generated description using the built-in n8n form completion page
